welcome.title: Welcome to Claw Wallet
welcome.description: Create a new wallet or import an existing one.

password.title: Set Password
password.description: Choose a strong password to encrypt your wallet.
password.importDescription: Enter your mnemonic and set a password.

mnemonic.title: Backup Your Mnemonic
mnemonic.warning: Write down these 12 words and keep them safe. This is the only way to recover your wallet.
mnemonic.confirmLabel: I have written down my mnemonic
